nodes.name: Cuando es llamado por otro workflow

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first()?.json || {};

const setBase = {
  Company: input.Company || input.company || 'TecnoComp',
  company: input.company || input.Company || 'TecnoComp',
  timezone: input.timezone || 'America/Santiago',
  email_from: input.email_from || 'notificaciones@dominio.cl',
  email_to: input.email_to || 'destinatario@dominio.cl',
  email_cc: input.email_cc || '',
  email_bcc: input.email_bcc || '',
  itop_url: input.itop_url || 'http://172.16.123.132/itop/',
  itop_organization: input.itop_organization || 'Minera GoldFields Chile',
  itop_limit: Number(input.itop_limit || 5000),
  template_root: input.template_root || '/opt/n8n-config/templates/mail/v1',
  source_label: input.source_label || 'Producci?n / iTop CMDB',
  default_detail_level: input.default_detail_level || 'full',
  flags: {
    send_email: input.send_email !== false,
    include_attachment: input.include_attachment !== false,
    include_summary: input.include_summary !== false,
    include_detail: input.include_detail !== false,
    include_operational_notes: input.include_operational_notes !== false,
  },
};

return [{ json: { ...setBase, set_base_version: 'mail-config-v1' } }];
